privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introText: MenuCraft ("we", "us", "our") operates the menucraft.online website and service. This Privacy Policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and how you can manage or delete your data.
privacy.dataCollected1: Account information: email address and password (hashed) when you register.
privacy.dataCollected2: Venue information: venue names and descriptions you create.
privacy.dataCollected3: Menu data: meal names, prices, and generated menu PDFs.
privacy.dataCollected4: Template data: PDF templates you upload for menu generation.
privacy.facebookDataIntro: When you connect a Facebook Page through our app, we receive and store:
privacy.facebookData1: Your Facebook Page ID and Page name.
privacy.facebookData2: A Page Access Token (stored AES-encrypted, never exposed to the frontend).
privacy.facebookData3: We do NOT store your personal Facebook profile data, friend lists, or any data beyond what is needed to post to your Page.
privacy.facebookDataStorage: Page Access Tokens are encrypted at rest using AES-256 and are used solely to publish content to your Facebook Page on your behalf.
privacy.howWeUse1: To generate and render restaurant menu PDFs based on your input.
privacy.howWeUse2: To publish menu content to your connected Facebook Pages when you explicitly request it.
privacy.howWeUse3: To maintain your account, venues, and menu history.
privacy.dataSharingText: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties. Data is only sent to Facebook when you explicitly choose to post content to your connected Page. We use OpenAI's API to calculate menu layout positions — only meal names and prices are sent, with no personal information.
privacy.dataRetentionText: Your data is retained as long as your account is active. Generated menus are stored in your history until you delete them. Facebook tokens are cleared immediately when you disconnect a Page.
privacy.deletionText: You can disconnect any Facebook Page at any time from the Venues page, which immediately deletes the stored token. To delete your entire account and all associated data (venues, menus, templates, Facebook connections), please contact us at support@menucraft.online. We will process your request within 30 days.
privacy.contactText: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us at support@menucraft.online.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptanceText: By accessing or using MenuCraft (menucraft.online), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the service.
terms.serviceText: MenuCraft is a web application that allows restaurant owners and managers to create PDF menus from templates, manage venues, and optionally publish menus to connected Facebook Pages.
terms.accountsText: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials. You must provide accurate information when registering. We reserve the right to suspend accounts that violate these terms.
terms.contentText: You retain ownership of all content you upload (templates, meal data, images). By using the service, you grant MenuCraft a limited license to process your content solely for the purpose of generating menus and publishing to Facebook on your behalf.
terms.facebookText: When you connect a Facebook Page, you authorize MenuCraft to post content to that Page. You can revoke this access at any time by disconnecting the Page from the Venues section. MenuCraft is not responsible for Facebook's own terms, policies, or service availability.
terms.disclaimerText: The service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability, error-free operation, or that generated menus will meet specific design requirements.
terms.limitationText: MenuCraft shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of the service, including but not limited to loss of data or business interruption.
terms.changesText: We may update these Terms at any time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
terms.contactText: For questions about these Terms, contact us at support@menucraft.online.
